title: thuja occidentalis f. fastigiata
intro: Thuja occidentalis f. fastigiata, also known as Eastern White Cedar, is a variety of the Eastern White Cedar plant, characterized by its narrow, columnar growth habit. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as thujone and bornyl acetate. The health benefits of Thuja occidentalis f. fastigiata include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and reduce the severity of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Thuja occidentalis f. fastigiata include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and alleviate coughs.
